pr.title: Record: SP4096 + Polar Express + MuonEq-R + Depth Recurrence — 1.0923 BPB (3-seed)

output.summary: SP4096 base adds Polar Express NS with MuonEq-R row-norm, depth recurrence in layers 3-5, and WD/MLR tuning for compression-friendly quantization.
techniques: Polar Express NS orthogonalization with MuonEq-R gradient row-normalization
Depth recurrence sharing MLP weights across layers 3-5
Higher weight decay with tuned matrix LR for quantization-friendly compression
